## Kendo WebProfessional Grade UI Components

This package is part of the [Kendo UI for Angular](https://www.telerik.com/kendo-angular-ui/), [Telerik UI for Blazor](https://www.telerik.com/blazor-ui), [Kendo UI for jQuery](https://www.telerik.com/kendo-jquery-ui), and [KendoReact](https://www.telerik.com/kendo-react-ui/components/#react-components) suites.

## License

This is commercial software. To use it, you need to agree to the:

* [**Telerik End User License Agreement for Kendo UI** (for Kendo UI for Angular & jQuery)](http://www.telerik.com/purchase/license-agreement/kendo-ui)
* [**End User License Agreement for Progress KendoReact** (for KendoReact)](https://www.telerik.com/purchase/license-agreement/progress-kendoreact)
* [**End User License Agreement for Progress Telerik UI for Blazor** (for Telerik UI for Blazor)](https://www.telerik.com/purchase/license-agreement/blazor-ui)

If you do not own a commercial license, this file shall be governed by the trial license terms.

All available Kendo UI commercial licenses may be obtained at http://www.telerik.com/purchase/kendo-ui.
